Quality Education.reason: Focus on advanced statistical methods supports educational research and analysis (Target 4.4).
evidence: 獨立分析資料的技術能力
學術論文之計量方法能力

Quality Education.reason: As an advanced statistics course in the Education department, it builds capacity for high-quality educational research, directly supporting the improvement of education systems and outcomes.
evidence: 高階統計學方法課程之一 (one of the advanced statistics method courses)
為未來的學位論文撰寫、文獻閱讀、資料分析、與量化研究報告的撰寫，奠定良好與紮實的基礎 (lay a good and solid foundation for future thesis writing, literature reading, data analysis, and quantitative research report writing)

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course enhances scientific research capabilities (Target 9.5) by teaching advanced quantitative methods for data analysis and fostering the 'Research capacity to propose innovative solutions'.
evidence: 具備執行研究與解決問題的能力 (Ability to conduct research and solve problems)
具備提出創新性問題解決的研究能力 (Research capacity to propose innovative solutions to problems)

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Directly supports statistical capacity-building (Targets 17.18, 17.19) by teaching the 'technical ability to independently analyze data', essential for developing high-quality measurements of progress.
evidence: 具有獨立分析資料的技術能力 (the technical ability to independently analyze data)
量化研究報告的撰寫 (quantitative research report writing)
